items.title: Double EXP Weekend
items.body: 2x EXP across the whole server Friday 18:00 through Sunday midnight (server time). Stack it with holiday buffs for big gains.

items.title: Boss Rush — Sign Up
items.body: Weekend boss-rush event with cosmetic rewards. Grab a party and register through the NPC in the Free Market.

items.title: Welcome New Players
items.body: New to Exodus? Hit the Discord for a starter guide, then jump in. See you in Henesys!
